_comment: search_archetypes.json — canonical archetype config for CareerCopilot hardware pipeline.
_authority: AGENTS.md is ultimate policy. This file drives build_shortlist.py --archetype and prompt GPU sweep lists. When this file conflicts with AGENTS.md, follow AGENTS.md and update this file.

archetypes.label: gaming_laptop_private_sale
archetypes.description: Secondary-market gaming laptops from private sellers on Facebook Marketplace and Gumtree AU. Focus on used/like-new condition with strong VRAM at aggressive prices.

price.note: Lower ceiling than Track 1 standard; private-sale pricing should reflect discount from RRP.

age.note: Applies to manufacture year derived from CPU generation.

search_pattern_hints: <gpu model> laptop used refurbished Australia Gumtree

archetypes.intent_notes_template: Scored as gaming_laptop_private_sale: sources=FB_MARKETPLACE/GUMTREE_AU, condition=used/like_new, ceiling=$3,500 AUD, GPU preferred: RTX 4090/4080/3080 Ti, max age 4yr

archetypes.label: gaming_laptop_retailer
archetypes.display_name: Gaming Laptop — Major Retailer New/Open Box (Track 1A)
archetypes.description: New or open-box gaming laptops from major AU retailers (JB Hi-Fi, Scorptec, PLE, ASUS Store AU, Lenovo AU, MSI AU). Full warranty path. Preferred for GOOD ENOUGH if budget allows.

price.note: Standard Track 1 budget cap per AGENTS.md.

age.note: No age restriction for new retail stock.

search_pattern_hints: <gpu model> laptop new Australia JB Hi-Fi Scorptec PLE
<model name> open box clearance Australia warranty
high_value_pass_order: RTX 5070 Ti 12 GB — new AU retail
RTX 3080 Ti 16 GB — open box/clearance AU

archetypes.intent_notes_template: Scored as gaming_laptop_retailer: sources=MANUFACTURER_AU/MAJOR_RETAILER_AU, condition=new/open_box, ceiling=$5,000 AUD, GPU preferred: RTX 4090+/5080+

archetypes.label: strix_halo_laptop
archetypes.display_name: AMD Strix Halo Unified Memory Laptop (Track 1B)
archetypes.description: Laptops with AMD Strix Halo / Ryzen AI Max / Ryzen AI Max+ SoC and large unified memory pool. AU retail stock only. ROCm toolchain risk must be assessed explicitly.

price.note: Standard Track 1 budget cap per AGENTS.md.

age.note: Strix Halo is current-gen (2025). Age restriction not applicable.

spec.toolchain_risk_note: ROCm/CUDA compatibility must be confirmed for CareerCopilot workloads. Flag uncertain_rocm_or_toolchain_support if not verified.

soc_targets: ASUS ProArt Studiobook 16 Ryzen AI Max
ASUS ROG Strix Ryzen AI Max
search_pattern_hints: Strix Halo laptop 64GB unified memory AU
high_value_pass_order: Ryzen AI Max+ 128 GB unified — new AU retail
Ryzen AI Max 64 GB unified — new AU retail
Ryzen AI Max 32 GB unified — new AU retail (assess T2 avoidance)

archetypes.intent_notes_template: Scored as strix_halo_laptop: SoC=Strix Halo/Ryzen AI Max, sources=MANUFACTURER_AU/MAJOR_RETAILER_AU, condition=new, ceiling=$5,000 AUD, unified memory preferred: 64 GB+. Performance_Headroom capped at 7. Track2_Avoidance cap: 32GB=6, 64GB=7, 128GB=8.

archetypes.label: refurb_workstation_au
archetypes.description: Refurbished prebuilt desktop workstations from credible AU resellers (Scorptec, MikePC, JW Computers, eBay power sellers). Only consider under Exception A — when no viable Track 1 option exists or value clearly exceeds Track 1.
archetypes.exception_gate: Exception A only — re-check Track 1 for discounts/refurb before triggering this archetype.

price.note: Track 1.5 has a lower effective ceiling than Track 1 per AGENTS.md.

age.note: GPU age limit. RTX 3090 (2020) is at the boundary.

gpu_tiers: RTX 3090 24 GB desktop prebuilt refurbished Australia
search_pattern_hints: <gpu model> prebuilt workstation eBay Australia sold listings
high_value_pass_order: RTX 3090 24 GB — refurb prebuilt, verified AU stock
RTX 4090 24 GB — refurb prebuilt, verified AU stock
RTX 4080 16 GB — refurb prebuilt, verified AU stock

archetypes.intent_notes_template: Scored as refurb_workstation_au (Track 1.5, Exception A): sources=EBAY_AU/REFURB_SELLER, condition=refurbished, ceiling=$4,000 AUD, GPU preferred: RTX 3090 24GB / RTX 4090. Prebuilt only — no DIY.

search_templates._comment: Shared search lists referenced by all archetypes. Update here; prompts and scripts read from this file.
all_tracked_gpu_tiers: Ryzen AI Max Strix Halo Laptop 32 GB+
